winning_test.source:
import pytest
import gradebook.analytics


def test_letter_grade_59_is_failing():
    assert gradebook.analytics.letter_grade(59) == "F"
winning_test.targeted_behavior: The D/F cutoff is inclusive at 60, so a score of 59 must receive F.
